delta_from_prior_review.v3_fix1_note: Article 49A source line correctly distinguishes Royal Assent (31 Aug 2022) from Gazette publication (6 Sep 2022). 49A(2)(c) expulsion exclusion verified.
delta_from_prior_review.v3_fix2_note: GRS paragraph correctly distinguishes 2020 electoral umbrella (PN+BN+PBS) from 2022 registered GRS (Bersatu, PBS, STAR, SAPP, without BN/PAS).
new_errors_found_in_v4: TLDR and base-rates frame PKR as sharing the launch-and-pivot ingredients with Bersatu and GRS. PKR/KeADILan was a Reformasi opposition vehicle founded April 1999, won 5 seats first contest, reached federal power only much later. Different model — durability vehicle, not defector-pivot.
launches-timeline 'DAP/Gerakan 1969' misleading inside a launch timeline. DAP formed Oct 1965, registered Mar 1966; Gerakan founded Mar 1968. 1969 was the electoral breakthrough, not the launch year.

items_still_blocking_publication: Revise TLDR bullet 5 to separate PKR from Bersatu/GRS launch-and-pivot model. Suggested: 'Most new parties fail. The fast office-seeking exceptions, especially Bersatu and GRS, share three ingredients: sitting-seat leverage, executive office on offer, pre-negotiated coalition slot. PKR is different: a Reformasi durability exception that converted movement politics into long-run institutional power.'
Revise base-rates so 'within two elections of formation' and 'sitting MPs in the launch party' are not applied to PKR unless narrowed and sourced.
Clarify launches-timeline: 'DAP formed 1965/registered 1966; Gerakan founded 1968; both broke through electorally in 1969.'
overall_assessment: The two v3 fixes landed correctly: Article 49A now properly distinguishes Royal Assent from Gazette publication, and the GRS paragraph now correctly separates the 2020 electoral pact from the 2022 registered coalition. However, the final residual scan found one central thesis overclaim involving PKR and one timeline ambiguity involving DAP/Gerakan. These are fixable without a major rewrite, but the dossier should not ship until those two lines are tightened.
